attacking_style: Solo attacks at medium distance (15-20km out), targeting disruptive timing rather than stage victory. Exploits gaps in sprint team organization windows.
team_tactics: Operates independently without visible team setup. Attacks appear opportunistic, designed to create chaos rather than win from breakaway.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain where sprint teams exist but aren't yet organized. Avoids pure sprint finishes where his lack of top-end speed is exposed.
vulnerability: Lacks sprint speed to convert solo efforts into victories. Vulnerable once organized chase with fresh domestiques mobilizes against him.
key_patterns: Launches solo disruption attacks 15-20km from finish despite lacking winning sprint speed
Times attacks to force premature domestique burns, disrupting opponent sprint trains
Operates as individual tactical disruptor rather than seeking personal stage wins
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows willingness to animate race tactically but insufficient data for trend
